compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect ticket CLI core query layer additions
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the four new ticket CLI subcommands added by this epic (exists, list-epics, list-descendants, next-batch). Documentation-only story; no runtime behavior change.

**Why**: Ensure future agents and contributors can discover the new subcommands through authoritative docs rather than source-code excavation.

**Scope**:
- IN: Update ticket-cli-reference.md (authoritative subcommand reference), CLAUDE.md Quick Reference section (where ticket CLI commands are listed), any docs that enumerate ticket CLI subcommands
- OUT: Creating new documentation files (update existing docs only); refactoring any runtime code

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md` contains full entries for each of the four new subcommands (exists, list-epics, list-descendants, next-batch) with syntax, flags, output format, and exit codes
  ← Satisfies: "A script author can retrieve next-batch, list-descendants, list-epics, and exists results using only ticket CLI commands — no knowledge of .tickets-tracker/ directory layout required"
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md's ticket CLI Quick Reference reflects the four new subcommands so agents discover them through standard onboarding context
- When this story is complete, the `ticket` dispatcher's bare-invocation help text (_usage) includes the four new subcommands so CLI discovery from `ticket` without arguments is accurate

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions
- [Maintainability] Check llms.txt and plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md — if either enumerates the dispatcher case statement or subcommand list, they also need updating
- [Docs] Depends on completion of stories 4c60-5e2e, df2e-6fdd, 99aa-ccf0, and the next-batch story — documentation cannot be finalized until the subcommand implementations are stable

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Consideration: [Docs] Full docs update surface includes: (1) plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md (authoritative subcommand reference); (2) CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table; (3) llms.txt if it enumerates ticket CLI subcommands; (4) plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md if it enumerates the dispatcher case statement; (5) the dispatcher _usage() help text in plugins/dso/scripts/ticket so bare-invocation help lists the new subcommands. Dispatcher _usage() is the highest-leverage surface because users discover subcommands via bare 'ticket' invocation. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
comments.author: Claude

comments.body: SCOPE EXTENSION (preplanning 2026-04-20): This documentation story now also covers the new `ticket ready` subcommand (b090-7ac6). Update ticket-cli-reference.md to add a `ready` section alongside `list`, `show`, `deps` — include the --epic/--story scope filters and --format=llm output mode with example LLM-shortened keys.
comments.author: Claude
